title: Qube expands beyond quant roots with launch of fundamental equity portfolio management team
summary: Qube Research & Technologies 扩展量化业务边界，组建基本面股票投资组合管理团队。

title: Verition parts company with quant portfolio manager
summary: Verition 与一名量化投资组合经理结束合作，属于多经理平台的人事变动信号。

title: Balyasny hires power strategist Alexander Dalsgaard in Singapore
summary: Balyasny 在新加坡扩充电力交易团队，显示其亚洲商品与能源能力继续加码。

title: Smaller hedge funds outperform multistrategy giants in H1 2026
summary: 2026 年上半年，小型对冲基金整体表现领先部分大型多策略平台。

title: Jain Global rebounds as Millennium partnership moves closer
summary: Jain Global 业绩反弹，与 Millennium 的合作讨论进一步推进。

title: Point72 leads multi-PM giants at midyear as firms capitalise on June volatility
summary: Point72 在多经理平台年中业绩比较中居前，6 月波动为策略贡献收益。

title: Millennium targets at least $10bn in new capital raise
summary: Millennium 据报计划募集至少 100 亿美元新资金，募资规模构成重要容量信号。

title: Elliott alumni establish new generation of activist hedge funds
summary: Elliott 前员工创办的新一代激进投资机构开始形成可观察的生态。
